name: Cape Town
author: worstboyinaustral1a
description:
Cape Town

CPT · 1.0.1

Where the Atlantic meets the Cape of Good Hope, Cape Town spans the foot of Table Mountain — a city of vineyards, ocean views, and townships stretching to Stellenbosch and Paarl.

Map Preview

Additional Features

  • Building Collision — A buildings index is included, providing in-game collision geometry for all non-filtered buildings.
  • Ocean Foundations — An ocean bathymetry layer is included, providing depth-colored ocean floor tiles for open-water areas.
  • Neighborhood Labels — The map includes municipal and neighborhood labels derived from administrative boundary data.

Methodology

  • Population from JRC GHS_POP E2025 (100 m resolution, Mollweide) — tile R14_C20
  • Employment derived from GHS_BUILT_V_NRES E2025 at 100 m³/job
  • Gravity model with job-centric O/D pairs, negative-exponential decay, 13.0 km median commute
  • Road distances via OSRM on OpenStreetMap extract
  • 87 special-site anchors (airports, universities, hospitals, shopping centres, stadiums, corporate HQs) to supplement GHS employment data
  • Map geometry via Planetiler + Depot v1.2.0

Data Sources

  • JRC GHS_POP E2025
  • JRC GHS_BUILT_V_NRES E2025
  • OpenStreetMap contributors (ODbL)
